cases.title: Testing-plan §3 my registrations paginated row after signup and login
preconditions: API server running at /api/v1
Published event in RegistrationOpen state with available capacity
Fresh unique email not yet registered
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with login JWT to create one registration
cases.expected: Single paginated GET /me/registrations returns HTTP 200 with items, page, pageSize, total, totalPages; registration row includes registrationId, eventId, eventName, state, updatedAt; no N+1 fan-out per testing-plan §3 my registrations paginated scenario

cases.title: POST /api/v1/auth/register returns JWT and Participant profile
preconditions: API server running at /api/v1
No existing user with target email
steps: Inspect HTTP status and response body
cases.expected: HTTP 200 or 201; response includes JWT access token and profile with displayName, email, and roles containing Participant only

cases.title: POST /api/v1/auth/login returns JWT and profile with roles
preconditions: Participant account exists via prior POST /auth/register
steps: Inspect HTTP status and response body
cases.expected: HTTP 200; response includes JWT and profile with roles array containing Participant; JWT sub claim is users.id UUID

cases.title: GET /api/v1/me/registrations returns 200 paginated envelope for authenticated participant
preconditions: Participant logged in via POST /auth/login with at least one registration
cases.expected: HTTP 200; body matches paginated envelope (items, page, pageSize, total, totalPages); default sort updatedAt:desc per API design §3

cases.title: Signup → login → view own registrations succeeds end-to-end via API
preconditions: API server running at /api/v1
Published open event with available capacity
Fresh unique email
cases.expected: Full AC-16 flow succeeds: account created with Participant role, login issues fresh JWT, GET /me/registrations returns participant's registration with correct state and event metadata

cases.title: Auth module persists user with Participant role and login JWT sub matches users.id
preconditions: Auth module and users table available with real DB transaction
No existing user with target email
steps: Query users table for new email and role assignment
POST /api/v1/auth/login and decode JWT sub claim
cases.expected: User row persisted with Participant role only (not OrganizerAdmin or OrganizerStaff); register and login JWT sub equals users.id; GET /me returns matching profile id and Participant role per roles-permissions §3.1

cases.title: My registrations repository returns only current actor rows in DB transaction
preconditions: Two distinct participants each with registrations on different events in database
Valid JWT for participant A from login
steps: Invoke registrations list service or GET /me/registrations as participant A
Query all registration rows for participant B in database
cases.expected: Response items contain only participant A registrations; no cross-participant data leaked; scope constraint per roles-permissions §3 enforced at query layer

cases.title: Browser Flow 0 signup → Flow 0b login → My Registrations shows own registrations
preconditions: Web app running with /signup, /login, and protected My Registrations route
Published open event available for registration
Fresh browser context with no stored JWT
steps: Navigate to /signup and submit email, password, and display name
Sign out or clear session, navigate to /login and sign in with same credentials
Register for an open event via participant UI
Navigate to My Registrations protected route
Observe TopBar account button and registration list
cases.expected: Signup and login succeed per Flow 0 and Flow 0b; TopBar shows participant displayName; My Registrations renders user's registration with event name and status; no redirect to /login after authenticated navigation

cases.title: Post-login redirect resumes intended My Registrations route after auth gate
preconditions: Route guard preserves return URL when unauthenticated user hits protected route
Fresh unregistered email available
steps: While unauthenticated, navigate directly to My Registrations protected route
Complete signup on /signup or follow redirect to /login and sign in
Observe post-auth navigation and page content
cases.expected: After successful login, user lands on originally requested My Registrations route; registration list loads without second manual navigation per Flow 0 step 4

cases.title: Participant JWT denied organizer-only GET /events/{eventId}/registrations
preconditions: Participant account created via signup and login flow
Event with existing registrations managed by organizer
cases.expected: HTTP 403 unauthorized; organizer roster endpoint not accessible to Participant role per permission matrix; participant self-service remains limited to GET /me/registrations

cases.title: Unauthenticated GET /me/registrations returns 401 before list query
preconditions: API server running
No Authorization header on request
cases.expected: HTTP 401 with standard error envelope; no registration items exposed; authentication gate enforced before AC-16 view-own-registrations flow

cases.title: My registrations paginated query returns correct total and page boundaries
preconditions: Participant with at least two registrations across events in database
Valid participant JWT
steps: Verify total, totalPages, and item count
cases.expected: pageSize boundary respected; total reflects all actor registrations; page 2 returns next item or empty slice with consistent metadata per pagination contract

cases.title: Duplicate signup with same email rejected with stable error code
preconditions: Existing participant account with email user@example.com
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/register with same email, different password and displayName
cases.expected: HTTP 400 or 409 with stable error code; no second user row created; login still works only with original credentials

cases.title: Login with wrong password after signup fails without JWT
preconditions: Participant account created via POST /auth/register with known password
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/login with correct email and incorrect password
cases.expected: HTTP 401 or 400 with authentication failure; no JWT returned; GET /me/registrations without valid token remains blocked

cases.title: Invalid page or pageSize on GET /me/registrations returns 400 INVALID_PAGINATION
preconditions: Authenticated participant JWT from login
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with error code INVALID_PAGINATION per API design §3; no partial or unbounded list returned

cases.title: Newly signed-up participant with zero registrations receives empty paginated list
preconditions: Fresh participant via POST /auth/register and POST /auth/login
Participant has not registered for any event
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with items: [], total: 0, and valid page/pageSize/totalPages metadata; signup → login → view flow succeeds despite empty list

cases.title: Re-login after TopBar sign-out restores My Registrations access
preconditions: Participant completed signup, registered for event, and viewed My Registrations
Client JWT cleared via TopBar sign-out per Flow 0b step 5
steps: Sign out from TopBar user menu and confirm redirect to /login
cases.expected: Protected route accessible after re-login; registration list repopulates with same user's data; signup → login → view flow repeatable across sessions

cases.title: Signup persists password with adaptive hashing not plaintext
preconditions: Database access to users credential storage column
Fresh signup email
steps: Read stored password hash from users table for new account
cases.expected: Stored value is bcrypt or argon2 hash; plaintext password not persisted; POST /auth/login succeeds with original password
